2025/26 Season

Fixtures

GW38 — Upcoming matchups

Matches of the Week · GW38
Featured Match

JordiCarb Locks Down Second

Home
benditlikebergvall
16–21 · 2926 pts
vs
Away
JordiCarb
22–15 · 3044 pts

JordiCarb comes in at 22-15 with 3,044 points-for and a one-game cushion on Noahvillasana17 for second place. Win here and second is sealed outright. Lose, and the door cracks open: Noah could pull level on wins (both 22-16) and the title goes to a PF tiebreaker that's currently a 27-point gap. benditlikebergvall sits at 16-21 with nothing left to play for except spoiler honors, but he's already pulled one upset on JordiCarb this season back in GW34. Don't sleep on this one.

Featured Match

Noah's Final Climb — and the Chasers Behind

Home
rmeernst
17–20 · 2994 pts
vs
Away
Noahvillasana17
21–16 · 3016 pts

Noahvillasana17 needs three things to overtake JordiCarb for 2nd: his own win against rmeernst, a JordiCarb loss to bergvall, and at least a 28-point PF swing to flip the tiebreaker. A tall order, but not impossible. The flip side is the threat from below: brennan (brendog2814, 20-17, 3,216 PF) and brian (bjennings28, 20-17, 3,054 PF) are both one win away from 21-17. If Noah loses and brennan wins, brennan takes 3rd outright on PF — he's been the league's hottest scorer down the stretch and the PF gap is over 200 points already. brian needs a near-miracle to leapfrog both, but a win keeps him relevant. Noah controls his own fate by winning; the rest is scoreboard-watching.
